text: ∆êvol…õ nsuu bara m…î…î ale…õ babu kpole w…î Yigyibiti az…õl…õ ye azo a.

ref: The famine will be so bad that no one will remember that once there had been plenty.
text: ∆êh…îne ne m…î…î bara la ati, awie …õnr…õnwu k…õ …õnee az…õl…õ ye azo le ale…õ ngome, …îluak…õ …õh…îne ne bay…õ kpole kpal…õ.

ref: God has given you two dreams to let you know that he has definitely decided to do this and that he will do it soon.
text: ∆êlal…õ fane nwi…î ne m…î…î Nana hanle la kile k…õ Nyamenle …õb…î ye kp…îk…õ …õwie, na …înr…õhy…õ biala na yeazi.

ref: Your Majesty, you should find someone who is wise and will know what to do, so that you can put him in charge of all Egypt.
text: ‚ÄúZ…îhane ati Nana, …îw…î k…õ …õye sonla m…î…î …î nye gyi …î ti anwo na …îze nr…õl…õb…õ la, na …õfa ye …õsie Yigyibiti az…õl…õ ye k…îs…î…îti anloa.

ref: Then appoint some other officials to collect one fifth of every crop harvested in Egypt during the seven years when there is plenty.
text: Nana …õb…î …î bo …õyeye menli m…î…î banlea az…õl…õ ne m…î azo la, na …îlie ale…õ biala m…î…î k…õvinde Yigyibiti az…õl…õ ye azo la anu ngy…õnu nnu …õkp…î ko w…î …õvol…õ nsuu ne m…î…î ale…õ babu la anu.

ref: Give them the power to collect the grain during those good years and to store it in your cities.
text: Maa b…õbo…îboa ale…õ m…î…î b…õbanyia ye w…î …õvol…õ kpal…õ ne m…î anu la anloa, na maa tumi maa b…õva ab…õl…õ b…õzie azuamgbole ne m…î azo, na b…õzinza.

ref: It can be stored until it is needed during the seven years when there won't be enough grain in Egypt. This will keep the country from being destroyed because of the lack of food. Joseph Is Made Governor over Egypt
text: Z…õhae ale…õ ne m…î…î b…õbabo…îboa …î nloa la y…õ…õ bay…õ ale…õ m…î…î bagyinla …õk…õ amaa …õvol…õ nsuu …õh…îne ne m…î…î bara Yigyibiti amuala la a, amaa saa …õh…îne ne ba a, …õh…îne angu maanlema amb…î b…õ bo zo.‚Äù B…õy…õ Dwosefi am…õnlado w…î Yigyibiti

ref: The king and his officials liked this plan.
text: Nzuzul…õ ne z…île Yigyibiti belemgbunli ne nee ye mgbanyima ne m…î amuala anye.

ref: So the king said to them, ‚ÄúWho could possibly handle this better than Joseph? After all, the Spirit of God is with him.‚Äù
text: Na …îzele ye mgbanyima ne m…î k…õ, ‚ÄúB…õnea a awie bie w…î …õk…õ t…õla …õhye m…î…î Nyamenle Sunsum ne w…î ye nu la …î?‚Äù

ref: The king told Joseph, ‚ÄúGod is the one who has shown you these things. No one else is as wise as you are or knows as much as you do.
text: Yem…îti belemgbunli ne zele Dwosefi k…õ, ‚ÄúK…õm…î Nyamenle …õye …õhye m…î amuala …õhile w…î la, awie …õnle …õk…õ m…î…î anye gyi …î ti anwo na …îze nr…õl…õb…õ k…õ …õdaw…î la.
